question: According to the Meta report, on which specific pages are the detailed breakdowns of Scope 3 emissions categories, operational GHG emissions by facility, and water withdrawal by facility located? What data does the Scope 3 table on page 50 show for Purchased Goods & Services and Capital Goods?
answers: Scope 3 emissions category breakdowns are on page 50 (Value chain GHG emissions table), operational GHG emissions by facility are on pages 47-48, and water withdrawal by facility is on page 53. The Scope 3 table on page 50 shows Purchased Goods & Services at 2,545,466 mt CO2e (30% of total) and Capital Goods at 5,346,583 mt CO2e (63% of total) for 2022. The environmental data spans pages 46-55 with detailed tables across all environmental metrics.

Scope 3 categories: page 50. Operational GHG by facility: pages 47-48. Water withdrawal by facility: page 53. At page 50: Purchased Goods & Services = 2,545,466 mt CO2e (30%), Capital Goods = 5,346,583 mt CO2e (63%).
